Send the property address and a short note. I’ll review available public records, check the permit situation, look for obvious red flags, and send back a clear next-step summary.

What you get

A clear written read on one address.

See a redacted sample Permit Review
01 / TIMELINE

Permit timeline

Key filing, issuance, revision, and closeout signals in order.

02 / SCOPE

Approved scope summary

Plain-English summary of what the public record appears to support.

03 / STATUS

Status context

What the current status likely means for the project right now.

04 / RISK

Risk flags

Issues that may create delay, exposure, or the wrong next move.

05 / NEXT STEP

Next-step recommendation

Direct guidance on what to verify, file, request, or escalate next.

Best for

When one address needs a real answer.

✓ Buying or leasing a property

✓ Verifying remodel or addition history

✓ Checking permit risk before design or construction

✓ Figuring out the right next permit step

Fast, direct, address-first.

Permit Review Plus
$149

A fast permit and property review to help you spot red flags, understand next steps, and avoid wasting time before calling the city, contractor, architect, or permit expeditor.

  • Permit history review
  • Jurisdiction lookup
  • Public-record red flag check
  • Simple written summary
  • Recommended next questions
  • Optional next-step call
Get Permit Review Plus — $149

Permit Review Plus helps you understand one property or permit situation. Gold Desk gives your business a monthly permit and workflow advantage.

PermitPulse does not guarantee approvals or replace licensed legal, architectural, engineering, or city guidance. The goal is to help you get clearer before you spend more time or money.

PermitPulse Gold Desk

For operators who do not want to guess.

Gold Desk is a private monthly permit intelligence and workflow support desk for permit-heavy operators. It is built for expeditors, ADU contractors, builders, property managers, investors, and real estate operators who want faster answers, cleaner follow-ups, and better systems around permits, projects, clients, and documents.

✓ Priority permit/property research

✓ Intake and follow-up cleanup

✓ Client update templates

✓ CRM, spreadsheet, or dashboard improvements

✓ Automation support

✓ Monthly systems upgrades

✓ Founding member number

✓ Gold Desk member kit after the first paid month

Founding seats are limited while this remains hands-on.

Request a Gold Desk Founding Seat
Coverage note

LA is the strongest market today.

Public permit data quality varies by city. Los Angeles is the deepest market today. Selected live support is also available in Pasadena, Santa Monica, and San Jose.
